title: The Lianja Epic: The Mongo Creation Hero
description: The creation epic of the Mongo people of the Congo — the hero Lianja is born fully grown, leads his people on a great migration, and establishes the world order.
introduction: The creation epic of the Mongo people of the Congo — the hero Lianja is born fully grown, leads his people on a great migration, and establishes the world order.

translation.text: Lianja was born fully grown, fully armed. He came out of his mother's body carrying a shield and a spear. He said: 'I have come to lead my people to the place where we shall live.'
